title: [ExportVerilog] CSE of Assert Action Block Temporaries trips VCS Lint

features.name: concurrent assertion with combinational condition wire shared with action block
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assertion with an action block, where a combinational wire expression is used in both the assertion condition and the action block
features.snippet:
wire _T = a | b;
assert property (@(posedge clock) _T) else $error("world", a);

features.name: assertion action block referencing unsampled combinational signal
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assertion action block that references a combinational signal not registered on the assertion clock domain
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clock) condition) else $error("msg", unsampled_signal);
